project_area: Education, workforce training, and skills development for youth aged 16–24, including high school equivalency/diploma attainment and affordable housing construction/renovation
demographic_requirements: Young people between the ages of 16–24
eligibility_summary: Funding is available to members of the Massachusetts YouthBuild Coalition, Inc., as outlined in the FY2025 state budget line item 7061-9626. Eligibility is contingent on adherence to the FY2025 state budget language and DESE RFP guidelines.
